A clean GitHub Pages layout with no Three.js dependency, focused on fast loading, polished typography, and easy updates before your deadline.

View Projects See CV

About Me

I'm Louis, a Mechanical Engineering student at Concordia University who enjoys building systems where hardware and software meet. I like taking ideas from concept to tested prototype, especially in motorsport and embedded applications.

This portfolio template highlights your strengths with a strong visual hierarchy and direct access to your key class requirements.

Projects

Formula Steering Wheel Paddle System

ESP32-based dual clutch paddle concept with hall sensors and Bluetooth for responsive control and lightweight packaging.

High-Voltage Harness Architecture

Electrical harness design and integration workflow for dynamic race conditions, emphasizing reliability and serviceability.

Hydrogel Mechanical Testing

Research support in biosensor and bio-ink formulation, with imaging analysis to link material ratios and cell viability outcomes.

Experience

GLV Harness and Enclosures Lead · Concordia Formula Racing

January 2025 – Present · Montreal, Quebec

Co-designed the accumulator and low-voltage wiring architecture, led PCB integration, and supported firmware debugging and system validation.

Research Assistant · McGill Craniofacial Tissue Engineering Lab

June 2024 – Present · Montreal, Quebec

Contributed to hydrogel research workflows, sample preparation, microscopy, and data interpretation for experimental characterization.
